text.title: Team Development Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the team-development methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: stage_diagnosis_evidence
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Tuckman stage must be diagnosed from observable retro signals (conflict frequency, decision speed, trust score) — not from intuition.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `stage-diagnosis-evidence` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: charter_decision_rights
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Team charter must name decision rights (who decides what) — absence triggers Storming on every contested call.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `charter-decision-rights` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: skill_matrix_coverage
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every critical skill must have ≥2 people marked (primary + secondary) — single-point-of-knowledge is a Storming trigger.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `skill-matrix-coverage` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: new_member_no_reset
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Adding 1 member to a Performing team must trigger a 1-week mini-Forming phase — not a full Forming reset.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `new-member-no-reset` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: retro_format_rotation
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Retro format must rotate quarterly (Start-Stop-Continue, 4Ls, Mad-Sad-Glad, Sailboat) to prevent staleness.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `retro-format-rotation` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-team-development.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
